recommendations.title: Outlander
recommendations.overview: During the reign of the Vikings, a man from another world crash-lands on Earth, bringing with him an alien predator. The man must fuse his advanced technology with the weaponry of the vikings to fight the monster.

recommendations.title: 24 Hours to Live
recommendations.overview: An assassin seeks redemption after being given a second chance at life.

recommendations.title: 3-Headed Shark Attack
recommendations.overview: The world’s greatest killing machine is three times as deadly, when a mutated shark threatens a cruise ship. As the shark eats its way from one end of the ship to the next, the passengers fight the deadly predator using anything they can find.

recommendations.title: Predator: Badlands
recommendations.overview: Cast out from his clan, a young Predator finds an unlikely ally in a damaged android and embarks on a treacherous journey in search of the ultimate adversary.

recommendations.title: Dory's Reef Cam
recommendations.overview: Dive into the waters below and watch the aquatic wildlife from the world of Nemo and Dory.

recommendations.title: Prey
recommendations.overview: When danger threatens her camp, the fierce and highly skilled Comanche warrior Naru sets out to protect her people. But the prey she stalks turns out to be a highly evolved alien predator with a technically advanced arsenal.

recommendations.title: Miracle Mile
recommendations.genres: Romance, Drama, Science Fiction, Thriller, Comedy, Action
recommendations.overview: After 30 years of searching, Harry has finally met the girl of his dreams. Unfortunately, before they even have a chance to go on their first date, Harry intercepts some chilling news: WWIII has begun and nuclear missiles will destroy Los Angeles in

recommendations.title: Aliens vs Predator: Requiem
recommendations.overview: After a horrifying PredAlien crash-lands near a small Colorado town, killing everyone it encounters and producing countless Alien offspring, a lone Predator arrives to "clean up" the infestation.

recommendations.title: Ghost Shark
recommendations.overview: A coastal town is plagued by a supernatural man-eating shark. A ghost hunter joins forces with a sea captain to uncover the secrets of the area's dark past and find a way to exorcise the spectral predator.

recommendations.title: Dark Light
recommendations.overview: A woman returns to her family home and discovers it to be inhabited by monsters.
